title: cryptantha gracilis
intro: Cryptantha gracilis is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Cryptantha gracilis can be made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be infused in hot water to make a tea or used in salves and ointments for topical application.
